mapper.sql: id, dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, dict_sort, css_class, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY dict_sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_data ( dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, dict_sort, css_class, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{dictType}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{dictSort}, #{cssClass}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_data
dict_type = #{dictType}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, dict_sort = #{dictSort}, css_class = #{cssClass}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0
